[...] ⸢MI?⸣ LU TU IM šeIN.NU.DAL ZA [...]

[...] ⸢ZIG?⸣ gišMA.NU ina tub-qa-a-tu tu-mar-⸢ra⸣-[...]

flake 5'5'

[...] ⸢SIG₂⸣ munusAŠ₂.GAR₃ GIŠ₃.NU.ZU BABBAR u GE₆ gišGAG-MEŠ gišx [...]

[...] wool from a virgin female kid, white and black, pegs, ... [...]

flake 6'6'

[...] x ZI₃ x x i-ta-at gišNU₂ ḪURir gišNU₂ [...]

[...] you draw ... flour ... around the bed. The bed [...]

flake 7'7'

[...] x si?-i-šu₂ 2?-⸢TA⸣ ZABAR ša₂ GIN₂-TA.AM₃ [...]

[...] ... 2 of its date-palm fibres, bronze (weighing) a shekel, [...]

flake 8'8'

[...] x MUŠEN GAR.GARan ⸢NAM? TA?⸣ ŠUB.ŠUBdi MUŠEN SUM [...]

[...] you repeatedly put a bird .... You repeatedly throw .... You present the bird. [...]

flake 9'9'

[...] x gišŠA₃.GIŠIMMAR gišMA.⸢NU⸣ [x]-ra?-an ša₂ x [...]

[...] ... palm-heart, ēru-wood, [...] ... of ... [...]

flake 10'10'

[...] x BU ina muḫ?-ḫi RU IM MA 14 IM x [...]

[...] ... on top ... 14 ... [...]

flake 11'11'

[...] ⸢E₂?⸣ IM IGI UD te-pe-eḫ-ḫe 14 ⸢GI⸣ [...]
